introSection: Zyklon was a steel roller coaster located at Botton's Pleasure Beach in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK. It opened in 1979, replacing the Wild Mouse. It operated until the end of 1990, and was replaced by the Storm and what happened to it is unknown.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Built on top of a building, this roller coaster had a view of the nearby beach. It was painted red with yellow supports.

fullText:
Zyklon was a steel roller coaster located at Botton's Pleasure Beach in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK. It opened in 1979, replacing the Wild Mouse. It operated until the end of 1990, and was replaced by the Storm and what happened to it is unknown.

Built on top of a building, this roller coaster had a view of the nearby beach. It was painted red with yellow supports.




 * A photograph of the Zyklon from a Pinfari brochure
 * A photograph shows the Zyklon existed at the park with the Big Apple.
 * https://skegness.wordpress.com/2013/05/16/the-storm-bottons-new-amusement-park-ride/
 * https://skegness.wordpress.com/1970s/
